question: What was Alphabet total revenue in Q1 2026? Return the numeric value in USD millions.
citations: Consolidated Alphabet revenues increased 22%, or 19% in constant currency, to $109.9 billion

question: What was Alphabet total revenue in Q1 2025? Return the numeric value in USD millions.
citations: Consolidated Alphabet revenues increased 22%, or 19% in constant currency, to $109.9 billion

question: What year-over-year revenue growth rate was reported for Q1 2026? Return percentage.
citations: Consolidated Alphabet revenues increased 22%, or 19% in constant currency, to $109.9 billion, reflecting strong performance across the business and our 11th consecutive quarter of double-digit growth.
